children.heading: Departmental mission
children.label: 1 Departmental mission
children.text: The term “departmental mission” means any of the functions vested in the Secretary by the Department of Energy Organization Act ( et seq.) or other law.42 U.S.C. 7101

children.heading: Hispanic-serving institution
children.label: 2 Hispanic-serving institution
children.text: The term “Hispanic-serving institution” has the meaning given the term in .section 1101a(a) of title 20

children.heading: Nonmilitary energy laboratory
children.label: 3 Nonmilitary energy laboratory
children.text: The term “nonmilitary energy laboratory” means a National Laboratory other than a National Laboratory listed in subparagraph (G), (H), or (N) of .section 15801(3) of this title

children.heading: Part B institution
children.label: 4 Part B institution
children.text: The term “part B institution” has the meaning given the term in .section 1061 of title 20

children.label: A
children.text: any of the primarily single-purpose entities owned by the Department; or

children.label: B
children.text: any other organization of the Department designated by the Secretary.

children.heading: University
children.label: 6 University
children.text: The term “university” has the meaning given the term “institution of higher education” in .section 1001 of title 20
